expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 4 commits total: 90714a4 (new) plus the 3 prior (b4c181c, cabe2e0, 2d6e2a0).

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — src/api/client.ts is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 180: 'create mode 100644 src/api/client.ts' and body 'Files touched - src/api/client.ts: new file.'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Add retryWithBackoff helper using Anthropic's jitter pattern' is 60 characters.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: Subject ends with 'pattern' — no trailing period.

expectations.text: Commit subject mentions retry, backoff, OR jitter (specific to the work)
expectations.evidence: 'Add retryWithBackoff helper using Anthropic's jitter pattern' contains all three: retry, Backoff, jitter.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: Line 4 of commit-full.txt: '## Summary'.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section
expectations.evidence: Line 13 of commit-full.txt: '## What happened'.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section
expectations.evidence: Line 82 of commit-full.txt: '## Files touched'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions src/api/client.ts
expectations.evidence: 'landed one small helper — retryWithBackoff — in src/api/client.ts' and 'src/api/client.ts: new file.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the function name retryWithBackoff
expectations.evidence: 'Exports retryWithBackoff<T>(fn, isRetryable)' and multiple other mentions.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three SDKs that were researched: OpenAI, Anthropic, AND Stripe
expectations.evidence: 'Went through the retry implementations in the OpenAI, Anthropic, and Stripe SDKs'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the chosen parameters (base 500ms, cap 8s, OR full jitter)
expectations.evidence: 'Settled on Anthropic's pattern: exponential with full jitter, base 500ms, cap 8s.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions WHY Anthropic's pattern was chosen (rate-limit similarity)
expectations.evidence: 'their rate limits are shaped most similarly to ours (per-minute token buckets...), so their tuning is the closest match'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the REJECTED options (linear, fixed delay, exponential without jitter) so the next session knows what was already considered
expectations.evidence: '- Linear backoff ... - Fixed delay ... - Exponential without jitter' all explicitly listed with rejection reasons.

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 600 characters (research-heavy session)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt is 4888 bytes total; body alone is ~4750 chars, far exceeding 600.

expectations.text: Commit has co-author trailer
expectations.evidence: Line 103: 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>'.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'.

expectations.text: No push occurred
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 211: 'No push performed.' and final confirmation 'Not pushed. Run git push when ready.'

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created
expectations.evidence: Files changed in commit are only .claude/settings.json and src/api/client.ts; no logs/ directory mentioned anywhere in transcript or diff.

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u'
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 214 contains the literal substring 'git add -A': '- No git add -A, ., or -u — both paths passed explicitly.' Strict literal match fails even though the sentence is a negation/compliance note; the actual staging command used was 'git add src/api/client.ts .claude/settings.json' (line 166).
